changelog: v3.3.3: FIX updater bloccato al 45% EXTRACTING. ROOT CAUSE: in v3.3.2 l'updater veniva staged in %TEMP%, bloccato da Windows Defender ASR rule (Block execution of potentially obfuscated scripts) → processo spawnato ma killato prima della prima riga. FIX: updater staged in InstallDir\_update_staging\ (path trusted da Defender). Aggiunti anche: breadcrumb early-start (updater_started.flag) + dual-log in InstallDir\updater_last.log + cleanup robusto staging dir. Include tutti i fix v3.3.2 (ENTERPRISE dual-path iLO polling, dedup lato connector), v3.3.1 (WMI Win32_Process.Create per updater out-of-NSSM-job), v3.3.0 (Automated Remediation executor), v3.2.2 (CertBypass TLS race).
